description: §Fase 29.d — Fintech / banking / AML vertical suggest dictionary. Curated from Bank Secrecy Act (BSA), USA PATRIOT Act, FinCEN guidance, OFAC sanctions program references, MiFID II / GDPR Art. 6(1)(c), and PCI DSS canonical control IDs. ~50 terms first-cut per D3 resolution. Updates via PR review per D7 (CODEOWNERS sign-off from AML team tech lead).
license_note: Terminology is regulatory + ISO 20022 + public payments standards. Provenance references cite federal-register / FinCEN / FATF / PCI SSC publications.
